ticket.subject: UPS Digital Connections Inquiry
ticket.description: I am the UPS Rep looking to review Plugin Hive as a fit for my customer that uses Shopify. How can we set up a call as I have some questions? I would like to chat asap.

comments.body:
Hello Brianna Contreras,

Good day!

I tried reaching you at 7143108883, but the call couldn’t connect.

We can schedule a call at your convenience—please use the appointment link [CLICK HERE] to book a time that works best for you.
I’m also available now and for the next 3 hours, so if that works, please let me know and I’ll share the meeting link right away.

For your reference, the PH Multi Carrier Shipping Label app supports UPS integration and helps streamline shipping by displaying rates at checkout, generating labels in bulk, scheduling pickups, and sending tracking updates.

Yes, the UPS Digital Connection Program is supported. You can refer to the article for more details - https://www.pluginhive.com/ups-digital-connections/

I’ve also looped in Abhilash, who works closely with UPS, for further assistance.

Please feel free to reach out anytime if you need any help.

Thanks and Regards,
Manohar V
Team PluginHive

comments.body:
**Call Summary:**
Customer OASIS SOCIETY® | OFFICIAL SITE, is looking for **UPS Ground Saver** with the Digital Connection Program.

During the call, we discussed the supported features of our solution, including rate calculation, label generation, tracking, pickups, and multiple UPS account integration.

Brianna was very happy with the discussion and mentioned that this is exactly what the customer was looking for. We also offered to arrange a demo with the customer and a free onboarding call. Brianna will discuss this further with the customer.
comments.html_body:
Call Summary:
Customer OASIS SOCIETY® | OFFICIAL SITE, is looking for UPS Ground Saver with the Digital Connection Program.
 
During the call, we discussed the supported features of our solution, including rate calculation, label generation, tracking, pickups, and multiple UPS account integration.
 
Brianna was very happy with the discussion and mentioned that this is exactly what the customer was looking for. We also offered to arrange a demo with the customer and a free onboarding call. Brianna will discuss this further with the customer.
